title: indulgent molten russian pineapple molten bites
description: a rich, malty, and indulgent russian-inspired dessert featuring the sweetness of pineapple, made with a pressure-cooked molten center.
instructions: preheat the pressure cooker to 10 pounds of pressure.
in a large bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and salt.
add the softened butter and mix until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
in a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, vanilla extract, and pineapple juice.
add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
knead the dough on a floured surface for 5 minutes.
divide the dough into 12 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
press the center of each ball to form a hole and fill with about 1 tablespoon of caramel sauce.
place the balls into the pressure cooker and cook for 10 minutes at 10 pounds of pressure.
remove the balls from the pressure cooker and let cool for 2 minutes.
dip the tops of the balls in the heavy cream and then roll in confectioners sugar.
top each ball with a piece of pineapple and serve immediately.
